test.name: Scenario: Multi-Product Booking with Random Data

kw.name: Run Keywords
kw.arg: Login To System As Shipping User
kw.doc: Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.name: Login To System As Shipping User
New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\iTservice\\Document\\FEMS_AutomationTest\\testsuite\\Shipping\\SHIPPING02_CreateBooking\\output\\browser\\traces\\temp\\c7a959ac-17f5-4f01-8e24-39c540074f5b"}

kw.name: New Page
kw.doc: Open a new Page.
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://uataotfems.netbay.co.th/fems/#/auth/shipping/login
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.

kw.name: Set Browser Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout used by most input and getter keywords.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text 'trainingship' in the given field.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Netbay@123' in the given field.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Convert Date
kw.doc: Converts between supported `date formats`.

kw.name: Generate Random String
kw.doc: Generates a string with a desired ``length`` from the given ``chars``.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Booking Operation Template
kw.arg: รถยนต์ 4 ที่นั่ง
รับสินค้าขาเข้าปกติ
ภายในประเทศ/ท่าอื่น

kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text 'กระบี่' in the given field.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'id=queue-booking-tracking-search-vehicleProvince >> xpath=//a[contains(normalize-space(.), 'กระบี่')]'.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text 'รถยนต์ 4 ที่นั่ง' in the given field.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'id=vehicle-management-vehicle-type-id >> xpath=//a[contains(normalize-space(.), 'รถยนต์ 4 ที่นั่ง')]'.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) รับสินค้าขาเข้าปกติ by attribute SelectAttribute.label from element xpath=//select[@id='queue-booking-detail-bookingTypeId'].

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) TG by attribute SelectAttribute.label from element xpath=//select[@id="queue-booking-detail-origin"].

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) ภายในประเทศ/ท่าอื่น by attribute SelectAttribute.label from element xpath=//select[@id="queue-booking-detail-destination"].

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text '10' in the given field.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text '30' in the given field.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.doc: Types the given key combination into element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) ของมีค่า(TG) by attribute SelectAttribute.label from element xpath=//select[@id="queue-booking-detail-goodsType"].

branch.msg:
Invalid IF condition: Evaluating expression '$product_list != ' failed: SyntaxError: invalid syntax (<string>, line 1)
Variables in the original expression '$product_list != ${EMPTY}' were resolved before the expression was evaluated. Try using '$product_list != $EMPTY' syntax to avoid that. See Evaluating Expressions appendix in Robot Framework User Guide for more details.

kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

test.status:
Invalid IF condition: Evaluating expression '$product_list != ' failed: SyntaxError: invalid syntax (<string>, line 1)
Variables in the original expression '$product_list != ${EMPTY}' were resolved before the expression was evaluated. Try using '$product_list != $EMPTY' syntax to avoid that. See Evaluating Expressions appendix in Robot Framework User Guide for more details.

test.name: Scenario: Create Complete Booking Success

Invalid IF condition: Evaluating expression '$product_list != ' failed: SyntaxError: invalid syntax (<string>, line 1)
Variables in the original expression '$product_list != ${EMPTY}' were resolved before the expression was evaluated. Try using '$product_list != $EMPTY' syntax to avoid that. See Evaluating Expressions appendix in Robot Framework User Guide for more details.

test.status:
Invalid IF condition: Evaluating expression '$product_list != ' failed: SyntaxError: invalid syntax (<string>, line 1)
Variables in the original expression '$product_list != ${EMPTY}' were resolved before the expression was evaluated. Try using '$product_list != $EMPTY' syntax to avoid that. See Evaluating Expressions appendix in Robot Framework User Guide for more details.
